hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.ex|*.exs) mix format "$FILE";; esac
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.ex|*.exs) mix credo "$FILE" --strict --mute-exit-status;; esac
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.html.heex) mix lint_typography;; esac

INPUT=$(cat) && CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then git log -1 --pretty=%s | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf)(\(.+\))?:' || { echo 'ERROR: Commit message must follow semantic conventions (feat:/fix:/chore:/docs:/refactor:/test:/ci:/perf:)'; exit 1; }; fi
